message:
chore: update Cargo.lock for ftui 0.2.0 -> 0.2.1 dependency bump

Lockfile updated to reflect ftui crate family version bump from 0.2.0 to 0.2.1
(ftui, ftui-backend, ftui-core, ftui-layout, ftui-render, and related crates).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -390,7 +390,7 @@ checksum = "77ce24cb58228fbb8aa041425bb1050850ac19177686ea6e0f41a70416f56fdb"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "ftui"
-version = "0.2.0"
+version = "0.2.1"
 dependencies = [
  "ftui-core",
  "ftui-layout",
@@ -402,15 +402,15 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "ftui-backend"
-version = "0.2.0"
+version = "0.2.1"
 dependencies = [
  "ftui-core",
  "ftui-render",
 ]

-version = "0.2.0"
+version = "0.2.1"
 dependencies = [
  "ahash",
  "arc-swap",

  "rustc-hash",

  "bitflags",

+version = "0.2.1"

  "ftui-core",
  "ftui-layout",

-version = "0.2.0"
+version = "0.2.1"
